# Howard Chan
Founder and builder in Tokyo, incoming Cambridge HSPS.

Chak Hang (Howard) Chan. Founder, builder, and researcher; incoming University of Cambridge HSPS (Peterhouse).

## Ventures
- ElevateOS (elevateos.org): AI execution layer for tutoring and admissions agencies: a tutor logs a quick session note, and it becomes a parent-ready report and a clear set of next steps.
- Tatemori (tatemori.com): Compliance tooling for Japan’s customer-harassment (kasuhara) law, an employer obligation from October 2026: one-tap incident capture and an audit-ready evidence record.
- Prior Moves (priormoves.com): A live tool that turns top investors’ 13F filings into one weekly signal of what they’re buying next, with a public track record.
- nobill (nobill.app): A local-first subscription tracker that scans your own receipts for recurring charges and links straight to each merchant’s cancel page. Your data never leaves your device.
- Kiwanis Pulse (pulse.kvcn.org): A mobile convention companion surfacing schedules, venues, sessions, and announcements attendees can use instantly on their phones.
- Premier Trophy (crystalcentury.com): Operations and reliability for a Hong Kong custom-awards manufacturer (founded 2008): trophies, awards, crystal, and corporate gifts. The operational side of building.

## More projects
- Think College Level (thinkcollegelevel.com): IB & admissions guides for students
- Voices Academy (academy.kvcn.org): Free tutoring program (KVCN)
- Katalyst (katalyst.kvcn.org): Service-project & volunteer board
- KVCN Learn (learn.kvcn.org): Free learning-resource directory

## Research
- Hofstede’s Dimensions and Generational Effects on Ambiguous Emoji Semiotics: Cross-Cultural Analysis of Japanese and Chinese Digital Communication (Preprint · 2025)
- Unraveling Cognitive Aging: A Comprehensive Narrative Review Integrating Six Decades of the Seattle Longitudinal Study with Contemporary Advances (Review · 2025)
